notes: Sua loi voice preview/MP3 bao 'spawn ffmpeg ENOENT' (thieu binary ffmpeg khi dong goi), an cua so cmd flash len khi chay ffmpeg/piper/supertonic ngam, thu gon scene picker o Edit video thanh 1 hang vuot ngang, gom dung luong server + may vao menu tai khoan, AI Auto Edit giao dien gon hon, click vao chip 'Co loi' de xem chi tiet loi.
